signals.headline: HEADLINE | YES | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
HEADLINE | YES | LOW confidence**  
U.S. and Iran announced a **2-week ceasefire** on April 8, 2026, ahead of Trump's 8 p.m. ET deadline, conditional on Iran fully reopening the Strait of Hormuz, with Pakistan mediating talks in Islamabad and Israel agreeing to the contours[1][2].  
Iran acknowledged the deal via Tasnim News Agency, claiming acceptance of its 10-point plan, while Trump posted on T
